channel.title: Tracking Defender Policy Deployment with Logs :: Novian Andrian
channel.description: Have you ever set up Defender policies from GPO or Intune, and wondered whether the policies is indeed applied or not? Or maybe you are using MDE, and is seeing Security Recommendation to Enable Defender ASR Rules, you have applied it through GPO/Intune, but the Recommendation won’t go away? This guide will be focused at explaining Defender logs called MpRegistry.txt, that will show you how Defender is receiving the policy, and applied policy. This guiide will help you troubleshoot the following scenarios:
